description: An unrecognized field (sidecar_field) is nested inside the signed action_record. The ext escape hatch is top-level only; nested signed objects reject unknown fields.
notes: Verifier MUST reject unknown fields at any nesting depth within a signed v1 object (action_record, session_control and its payloads, key_transition, redaction, shield). ext is tolerated only at the receipt top level.
